ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_category" TEXT /* Category of the brand (e.g., luxury, casual) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Brand website URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparel_types" (
  "apparel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparel type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the apparel type (e.g., T-shirt, Jacket) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the apparel type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the apparel type (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the apparel type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the apparel type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apparel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with this size */,
  "apparel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel type associated with this size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in cm */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in cm */,
  "across_shoulder" REAL /* Across shoulder measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "fit_description" TEXT /* Description of the fit (e.g., slim, relaxed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_apparel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("apparel_type_id") REFERENCES apparel_types ("apparel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being tracked */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for this size */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold level for reordering stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of this size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_report" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size for which the report is generated */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total quantity sold for this size */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_report_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "size_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size history entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being tracked */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_audit" (
  "inventory_audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory audit entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory being tracked */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audit_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audit_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)
